description_long: This object is a fragment of a stone wall, constructed from irregularly shaped stones of varying sizes, tightly packed together with visible mortar filling the gaps. The stones are predominantly light gray and off-white, with some darker and brownish patches, suggesting a mix of natural stone types. The surface is rough and uneven, with protruding stones and jagged edges, indicating weathering and partial erosion. The wall section is incomplete, with broken and missing areas along the edges, giving it a rugged, aged appearance. The mortar between the stones is also weathered, with some areas appearing more recessed or eroded than others. This type of stonework is typical of historical or rustic urban environments, such as old city walls, garden barriers, or remnants of ancient structures.
description: A weathered, irregularly shaped section of stone wall with rough, protruding stones and visible mortar, showing signs of age and erosion.
description_view_0: This view highlights the uneven surface and protruding stones, with a clear display of mortar between the stones and jagged, broken edges.
description_view_1: This angle shows a flatter profile with more recessed mortar and a pronounced irregular edge, emphasizing the wall's fragmentary nature.
description_view_2: Here, the depth and layering of the stones are visible, with several stones jutting out and the roughness of the surface clearly apparent.
description_view_3: This view presents a broader face of the wall, showing a dense arrangement of stones and more continuous mortar lines, with less pronounced edge damage.
attribute_location: historic city wall or garden barrier in an urban park
attribute_placement: incorporated into a wall, partially freestanding or as a remnant section
attribute_pattern: Irregular, natural stone arrangement with no repeating pattern; visible mortar lines and random stone sizes create a rustic, organic look.
attribute_weathering: Rough and eroded, with chipped edges and recessed mortar, indicating prolonged exposure to the elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends with other stonework or natural features, may be partially overgrown or adjacent to vegetation, and contrasts with modern urban materials.
